brand.$description: Tier 2 brand identity — myNeva (demo sub-brand). ADDITIVE over Corilus. myNeva's identity is its bright ORANGE (#ED6739). Per the brand-exact decision, the primary is a CONCRETE off-ramp colour (like the logo) — the exact swatch — and high-profile fills carry DARK text (neutral.on-light) so they pass WCAG AA (~5.6:1) while matching the brand precisely. No orange ramp is used (removed). Everything not listed inherits Corilus.

primary.$description: myNeva orange #ED6739 — exact brand colour (off-ramp, like the logo). Action accent + active states.

primary-deep.$description: Solid action fill = the exact brand orange; carries DARK text (neutral.on-light) at AA.

primary-bright.$description: Brand orange accent/icon on dark surfaces.

secondary.$description: White — myNeva inverts to white on dark / ambient surfaces.

neutral.$description: Brand-exact fills use DARK text. on-light overrides Corilus's white so text/icons on the bright orange fill meet WCAG AA.

on-light.$description: Near-black text/icon on the brand-orange fill (~5.6:1).

fill.$description: Surface scale tinted toward the myNeva orange hue (taupe, hue 39) — overrides Corilus's cool slate so panels/cards/borders/body carry a faint warm cast. Same lightness/chroma as slate; only the hue differs.

logo.$description: FALLBACK gradient only. myNeva's real mark is a bundled SVG asset (src/lib/logo.js → BRAND_LOGOS.myneva), used verbatim with its own #ED6739 fill — it does NOT read these vars.

accent.$description: myNeva inverted-surface accent — warm amber/gold (references the shared amber ramp; read-only, does not modify it).

tint.$description: Selected-state overlay at the myNeva orange hue (39). Concrete OKLCH-with-alpha, shared tint weight (L/C 0.5792/0.1048); composites over any surface. Hex fallback #ae634a.

radius.$description: myNeva corner character — medium, matching the product's moderately rounded cards/buttons.

font.$description: myNeva uses Lato (bundled as base64 woff/ttf via build/gen-fonts.mjs).
